junior.question: What is the difference between supervised and unsupervised learning?
Tell me about a time you found a surprising insight in a dataset.
Your model has high accuracy on training data but performs poorly in testing. What do you do?
Explain p-value to someone without a technical background.
Describe a project where you had to clean incredibly messy data.
Stakeholders want a predictive model built, but you don't have enough data. How do you proceed?
What are the assumptions of linear regression?
Give an example of a time you communicated complex analytical results to business users.
You realize there was a major flaw in your data extraction logic after presenting your findings. What do you do?
How do you handle missing or imbalanced data?

mid.question: Explain the bias-variance tradeoff and how it impacts model choice.
Tell me about a time you deployed a model into production.
The business team doesn't trust the predictions of a black-box model. How do you build trust?
How would you approach building a recommendation engine for an e-commerce site?
Describe a time when your analytical model contradicted common business intuition.
Your model's performance slowly degrades over time in production. How do you diagnose and fix it?
What is your approach to hyperparameter tuning and model evaluation?
Tell me about a time you mentored a junior analyst or scientist.
You receive a vague request like 'predict which customers will churn'. How do you formalize the problem?
Discuss the pros and cons of using Deep Learning vs traditional ML models for tabular data.

senior.question: How do you design an enterprise-wide data strategy from scratch?
Tell me about a time you built a data science team and defined its culture.
A C-level executive wants you to use AI to solve a problem that is better solved with a simple heuristic. How do you manage this?
How do you architect an MLOps pipeline for continuous training and monitoring?
Describe a time you led a data science initiative that transformed a core business process.
How do you measure and report the ROI of a data science team?
There are ethical concerns surrounding data privacy in a new tracking feature. How do you address this?
Tell me about a time you handled competing priorities across multiple business units requiring data science resources.
Explain your approach to implementing scalable, real-time streaming analytics architectures.
If you were to join as our Head of Data, what are the first 3 things you would audit?
